jd_summary: People Operations Generalist on Modal's growing People team (AI-infra startup, $355M Series C, $4.65B valuation, $300M+ ARR). Owns the employee lifecycle end-to-end from offer acceptance through offboarding while building scalable processes and documentation. Duties: own and improve new-hire onboarding; serve as first point of contact for employee questions across the full HR spectrum, triaging/routing complex issues; maintain and improve self-service resources (FAQs, Notion pages); support rollouts of new People programs/policies (comms, manager enablement, documentation); help bring employee-experience programs and events to life (offsites, milestone recognition); process employee changes (promotions, equity refreshes) accurately, including updated employment letters and compliant files. Broad generalist scope, explicitly 'build foundations, not just maintain.'
yoe_required: 2+ years of People Operations experience, preferably at a high-growth startup
sponsorship_note: No sponsorship language, no work-authorization restriction, no ITAR/US-Person requirement in the JD. Not verified as a confirmed H-1B sponsor; per standing policy this is NOT a hard stop for a no-account Ashby role.
